heading: Mission readiness exercises
label: 3156 Mission readiness exercises
text: The joint policy required by shall also provide for the incorporation of contractors and contract operations in mission readiness exercises for operations that will include contracting and contractor support.section 3151 of this title
notes: CodificationThe text of subsec. (e)(3) of , which was transferred to this section and amended by , was based on , , .section 2333 of this titlePub. L. 116–283, § 1810(b)(6)Pub. L. 110–181, div. A, title VIII, § 849(a)122 Stat. 245Jan. 28, 2008
